name: heteronimos-semi-asistidos-sdk
description: Plugin-based Telegram bot SDK built on grammY

scripts.dev: bun run build:sdk && cd examples/console-app && bun run dev
scripts.dev:verbose: bun run build:sdk && cd examples/console-app && LOG_LEVEL=debug bun run dev
scripts.dev:dashboard: bun run build:sdk && cd examples/dashboard && bun run dev
scripts.dev:dashboard:verbose: bun run build:sdk && cd examples/dashboard && bun run dev:verbose
scripts.build:example: cd examples/console-app && bun build main.ts --outdir ../../dist-example --target node
scripts.examples:install: cd examples/console-app && bun install && cd ../dashboard && bun install && cd ../iacm-demo && bun install
scripts.test: bun run build:sdk && bun run examples:install && cd ../dashboard && bun install
scripts.test:report: bun run build:sdk && bun run examples:install && bun test ./tests --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=test-results.xml
scripts.test:coverage: bun run build:sdk && bun run examples:install && bun test ./tests --coverage
